description:
Valheim world integration for Archipelago.
Regions and locations are created in `create_regions` (including a call to `create_locations`).
Items are created in `create_items`.

0.2.0.description:
Forked from SergioAlonso's repo
Updated Archipelago.Multiclient.Net library to 6.7.1
Restructured mod plugin to install into its own directory
Added option to select goal boss
Added completion condition to apworld logic
Added on screen notification when receiving AP items

NOTE: I have changed the file structure from SergioAlonso's original layout. People upgrading from his version of the mod and apworld should delete the files from the old mod and apworld to avoid having duplicate files after the migration.
0.2.0.title: Valheim Archipelago Randomizer 0.2.0
